description_long: This rifle features a striking purple and pink galaxy-themed finish across its stock, receiver, and magazine, contrasted by metallic silver components on the barrel and front sight. The design is reminiscent of an AK-pattern rifle, with a curved detachable magazine and a fixed stock. The handguard, pistol grip, and magazine are all coated in the same vibrant cosmic pattern, while the barrel, gas tube, and front sight remain metallic, providing a functional and aesthetic contrast. The rifle includes standard iron sights, with the front sight post and rear sight block clearly visible. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all present and appear functional. The overall build suggests a robust, modern firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A purple and pink galaxy-themed AK-style rifle with metallic barrel and standard iron sights. The rifle features a fixed stock, curved magazine, and detailed functional components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, front sight, and a glimpse of the cosmic-patterned handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full galaxy-themed finish, curved magazine, fixed stock, and metallic barrel with iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's end, the slim receiver, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cosmic pattern, magazine, trigger, and metallic barrel, mirroring the left side's features.
